faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: You can return any item within 30 days of purchase for a full refund, provided it is unused and in original packaging.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping takes 1-2 business days.

faqs.question: How do I track my order?
faqs.answer: You can track your order by visiting our website and entering your order ID in the Track Order section.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placement. After that, the order enters processing and cannot be cancelled.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, PayPal, UPI, and Net Banking.

faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Go to the login page and click Forgot Password. Enter your registered email and follow the instructions sent to you.
